inventory.horizon: 200 weeks; shorter listing uses available history

inventory.duplicate_risk: medium: also reused inside v6.1 trend quality
medium: reused inside v6.1 trend quality

inventory.formula: keep previous side within ±2pt boundary crossing
MA200w + MA200 deviation + 52w position + sector + EPS rules
inventory.duplicate_risk: very high: reuses five v4 inputs
not directional; must stay outside HERD

limitations: correlation frame audits price-derived v4 inputs only
EPS and sector multipliers require point-in-time histories and are excluded
weekly MA audit starts after a full 200-week history; production short-history fallback is separately flagged
